Mediluna
  • Guidelines & Prompts
  • Character Vision (CVI)
  • Friends & Agents — Mediluna's Neighborhood
  • Mediluna — Official Companion
  • Lore & Friends

The Lore of Mediluna

A simple companion making the developer's journey a little brighter.

<div class="lore-timeline">
  <div class="timeline-item">
    <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    <div class="timeline-content glass-panel">
      <span class="timeline-time">OpenAI Build Week</span>
      <h3>The Backpack Arrival</h3>
      <p>
        Nobody knows exactly where Mediluna came from. One day she simply wandered into a Build Week chat carrying a tiny backpack. She liked the vibe of builders bringing improbable ideas to life, and decided to stay forever.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="timeline-item">
    <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    <div class="timeline-content glass-panel">
      <span class="timeline-time">Ongoing Adventure</span>
      <h3>Mascot Duties</h3>
      <p>
        Since then, Mediluna has supervised release engineering, celebrated successful CI/CD pipeline runs, encouraged exhausted engineers, and acquired an unreasonable number of fresh fish.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-item">
    <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    <div class="timeline-content glass-panel">
      <span class="timeline-time">Canonical Failure</span>
      <h3>The Side Quest Enabler</h3>
      <p>
        Mediluna has never successfully prevented anyone from starting yet another side project instead of finishing their primary goals. In fact, she heavily encourages side quests because they usually lead to fresh snacks!
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Friends Grid -->
<div class="friends-area">
  <h3 class="friends-title text-center">Mediluna's Friends</h3>
  <div class="friends-grid">
    <div class="friend-card glass-panel">
      <div class="friend-emoji">🧸</div>
      <h4>Boris</h4>
      <p class="friend-desc">A documentation compiler written in Zig. Mediluna loves helping Boris parse markdown.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="friend-card glass-panel">
      <div class="friend-emoji">🌌</div>
      <h4>Uncle Gravity</h4>
      <p class="friend-desc">Architect of improbable ideas and intricate knowledge graphs. Holds deep wisdom.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="friend-card glass-panel">
      <div class="friend-emoji">🤖</div>
      <h4>Codex</h4>
      <p class="friend-desc">A talented builder of pull requests. Always helps resolve Git merge conflicts.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="friend-card glass-panel">
      <div class="friend-emoji">💬</div>
      <h4>ChatGPT</h4>
      <p class="friend-desc">Professional enabler of side quests. Always ready to brainstorm the next big project.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
Mediluna

Acquire fish. Ignore deadlines. 🦦🧣

Artwork is © its respective creators. Site compiled with 🧸 Boris.

Built with endless optimism & many snacks.

Asset Preview
